topStories.title: Centre’s claim of no displacement of tribals a lie: Congress on Great Nicobar project
topStories.description: Congress targets the BJP-led Government over the Great Nicobar draft relocation plan. Citing a report by The Hindu, the party says concerns of local communities being ignored

topStories.title: New video reveals moment US-Israeli munitions impact Iranian bridge
topStories.description: New video shows the moment multiple US-Israeli strikes hit the B1 bridge in Iran's northern Alborz province on Thursday.

topStories.title: How US Trains Pilots To Survive, Evade Capture After Being Shot Down
topStories.description: The blueprint for these missions comes from the Personnel Recovery Joint Publication, which lays out two overriding imperatives. First, safeguard the aircrew and then secure sensitive systems.

topStories.title: Washington DC Launches $130k Pilot To Curb Rat Population Using Birth Control
topStories.description: Washington DC launches a $130,000 (Rs 1.2 crore) pilot programme combining poison and contraceptives to reduce the rat population.

topStories.title: ‘Your sons more in danger with Trump’: Iran embassies tell US mother searching for missing pilot son
topStories.description: The Iranian embassies told the American woman that her pilot son would be safer in Iranian custody and suggesting he was more at risk under Donald Trump’s care.

topStories.title: Trump says Iran has 48 hours to make deal as search for US pilot continues
topStories.description: Trump does not reference a downed US jet in his post but points to a deadline for Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

topStories.title: What the Iran-Iraq war can tell us about the US-Israeli war on Iran
topStories.description: Trump and Netanyahu are harbouring the same illusions Saddam Hussein had in 1980 when he invaded Iran.

topStories.title: Missing Since 1994, US Girl Found Alive After 32 Years In Cold Case Breakthrough
topStories.description: Christina Maria Plante, a resident of Star Valley in Arizona, was last seen on May 15, 1994. She had left her home to walk to a nearby stable but did not return.

topStories.title: Iran Signals Openness to Regional Diplomacy, Warns Of Broader Response Amid Escalating War
topStories.description: Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf pitches regional security without US-Israel role; FM Abbas Araghchi seeks "conclusive" end to what Tehran calls an imposed war

dailyNews.title: US jet downed - Crew member still missing as search enters second day, Iran rejects capture claims – Report
dailyNews.description: A US official reportedly said one pilot from the two-seat F-15E Strike Eagle shot down on Friday has already been rescued, while the second crew member is still unaccounted for

dailyNews.title: Iran says US, Israel belong in Stone Age after Tehran university strike

dailyNews.title: Quote of the Day by Charlie Chaplin: ‘You’ll never find a rainbow if…'
dailyNews.description: Charlie Chaplin's timeless words — 'You'll never find a rainbow if you're looking down' — remind us that hope is a direction, not just a feeling. Look up, and life's beauty reveals itself.

dailyNews.title: Central govt must not treat states as subordinates: SC Justice Nagarathna
dailyNews.description: Supreme Court Justice BV Nagarathna said the central government should treat states as equals, promoting cooperative federalism over hierarchical governance.

dailyNews.title: US Rescues One Crew Member From F-15 Jet Downed in Iran
dailyNews.description: Iran downed a US F-15E fighter jet and the US has rescued one of the two-person crew, according to a US official.

dailyNews.title: Trump calls out NYT for misstating NATO as North American Treaty Organisation, says 'very interesting mistake'
dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump criticised the New York Times for mistakenly calling NATO the North American Treaty Organization, citing it as a significant error. He claimed the newspaper's credibility has declined due to ‘fake news’, leading to reduced circulation.

dailyNews.title: Plea in Supreme Court challenges 2026 Transgender Rights Amendment, says it causes ‘irreparable constitutional injury’
dailyNews.description: Supreme Court petition challenges 2026 Transgender Rights Amendment passed by Parliament

dailyNews.description: Iranian media reported that American and Israeli aircraft targeted various strategic and civilian sites in Tehran on Friday afternoon, including the Shahid Beheshti University

dailyNews.title: Trump unveils $1.5T defense surge, deep domestic cuts — what’s on the budget chopping block
dailyNews.description: The White House proposes a fiscal year 2027 budget with roughly $1.5 trillion in defense spending and sweeping cuts to key domestic programs.

dailyNews.title: Trump warns "time is running out" on Iran to reopen Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: Meanwhile, a search-and-rescue mission for a downed fighter jet crew member is ongoing as the war in the Middle East rages on.

dailyNews.title: Trump warns Iran of deadline to reopen Strait of Hormuz: "Time is running out"
dailyNews.description: The war shows no signs of slowing as Iran responds to airstrikes with attacks across the region.

dailyNews.title: Judge halts Trump effort requiring colleges show they don't consider race
dailyNews.description: The ruling follows a lawsuit filed earlier this month by a coalition of 17 Democratic state attorneys general.

dailyNews.title: Did Trump help write the latest White House East Wing court filing?
dailyNews.description: The government's legal bid to continue East Wing construction has the hallmarks of President Trump's social media posts.

dailyNews.title: Trump warns Iran '48 hours before all Hell will reign down,' while search for missing crew member intensifies
dailyNews.description: The U.S. military continued to search for a missing American airman on Saturday after an F-15E fighter jet was shot down over southwestern Iran.

dailyNews.title: Warsh nomination moves ahead, putting Trump's competing Fed plans on a collision course
dailyNews.description: A Senate committee will consider Kevin Warsh's nomination even as one of its members still plans to block it.

dailyNews.title: Trump tariff fallout: Some industries grapple with lingering effects one year later
dailyNews.description: A year after his "liberation day," Trump's trade war has reshaped how companies in industries such as retail and autos are modeling economic and policy risk.

dailyNews.title: Trump fires Attorney General Pam Bondi
dailyNews.description: President Trump was said to be unhappy with Pam Bondi's handling of DOJ files about Jeffrey Epstein and the DOJ's failure to prosecute his political enemies.

dailyNews.title: Trump is considering more changes to his Cabinet in the coming weeks
dailyNews.description: In his first year back in the White House, President Donald Trump avoided using his famous “You’re fired” phrase when it came to members of his Cabinet.
